title: Handcrafted 3D Pop Up Storybook Travel Illustration AI
sourceTitle: Handcrafted 3D Pop Up Storybook Travel Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Classification: handcrafted 3D pop-up storybook travel illustration. Hero Subject: Marrakech old medina unfolding from a vintage book with layered paper arches, market stalls, palms, patterned tiles and tiny travelers. Scene or Context: warm sunset paper diorama with decorative page corners, small lanterns, birds and handcrafted miniature street life. Composition: vertical 4:5 open-book travel poster, dense middle-world detail, clean margins, title banner readable at thumbnail size; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5, 2:3, 3:4, or 9:16 framing unless the source format is essential; keep the main subject readable at thumbnail size and center-safe for X previews. Style Language: museum-quality paper engineering, vibrant travel-poster colors, layered papercraft, whimsical magical storybook atmosphere; high-contrast first-glance hook, polished editorial finish, clean visual hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: MARRAKECH / GOLDEN SOUK; use English-only readable text if text is part of the design, otherwise no visible text. Distribution Fit: Designed for a Pinterest Pin cover and an X image post: strong single-image hook, clear subject, clean crop, readable text, and enough visual value to support a prompt-thread or pin description. Restrictions: no real logos, no random letters, no cultural caricature, no clutter beyond organized miniature detail, no watermark; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter. Output: one polished finished image, no collage unless explicitly requested, no raw prompt text outside designed typography.
